entry.title: UBCO NGFW Security Update, August 12, 2026. 20:00-21:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 12, 20:00 - 21:00 PDT

Jun 16, 14:55 PDT
Scheduled - The UBCO campus border firewall will be under maintenance for security upgrades.

This maintenance will not impact UBCO network traffic and services.

entry.title: Canvas off-cycle maintenance window August 5, 2026 02:00-03:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 5, 02:00 - 03:00 PDT

Jul 3, 14:19 PDT
Scheduled - Canvas will be unavailable on Wednesday August 5, 2026 from 2:00 a.m. to 3:00 a.m. Pacific for a scheduled off-cycle maintenance window.

Please contact the LT Hub at LT.Hub@ubc.ca if you have any questions or concerns.

THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 30, 12:00 - 12:30 PDT

Jul 14, 14:25 PDT
Scheduled - The Convocation Management application (CNVM – Appian) will undergo maintenance from July 30, 2026 12:00 PT-12:30 PT. During this period, there may be a brief service disruption. Please plan accordingly.

entry.title: Okanagan Campus Network Maintenance July 27, 2026 9:00 PT-20:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 27, 09:00 - 20:00 PDT

Jul 14, 14:54 PDT
Scheduled - Network maintenance will occur for the Okanagan campus on July 27, 2026, 9:00-20:00 PT. Okanagan campus VPN service will see a brief disruption to service durring the maintenance window.

entry.title: University Computer Management System (UCMS) Maintenance July 25, 2026, 00:00-11:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 25, 00:00 - 11:00 PDT

Jul 14, 16:17 PDT
Scheduled - University Computer Management System (UCMS) Maintenance for Apple devices (Jamf Pro) will be undergoing routine maintenance on July 25, 2026, 00:00-11:00 PT. During this time Apple devices will not be able to contact the server for updates, however no disruption to the use of Apple devices is expected.

entry.title: Workday Scheduled Weekly Maintenance July 24, 2026, 21:00 PT to July 25, 2026, 00:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 24, 21:00 PDT  -  Jul 25, 00:00 PDT

Jul 20, 14:17 PDT
Scheduled - Please be advised that on July 24, 2026, 21:00 PT to July 25, 2026, 00:00 PT, Workday will be undergoing scheduled maintenance as part of its weekly service update. The system will remain accessible during the scheduled maintenance period but it is advised not to run critical processes and tasks.

Learn about Workday Support at UBC and other available resources on isc.ubc.ca.

entry.title: TouchNet TEST site - Scheduled Maintenance July 24, 2026 05:00 PT-17:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 24, 05:00 - 17:00 PDT

Jul 14, 13:20 PDT
Scheduled - The TouchNet TEST site will be undergoing scheduled maintenance. During the update window the TouchNet TEST site will be offline for logging in by staff as a TouchNet user and for making TEST payments.
For any questions please contact dpp.support@ubc.ca

entry.title: UBC IT Network – Intermapper 3 Server Rack Relocation July 23, 2026, 21:00 PT– July 24, 2026, 02:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 23, 21:00 PDT  -  Jul 24, 02:00 PDT

Jul 21, 14:02 PDT
Scheduled - UBC IT Network will relocate the server hosting Intermapper 3 during the maintenance window from Jul 23 2026, 21:00 PT to Jul 24, 2026, 02:00 PT. During the maintenance window, Intermapper 3 monitoring and AIR alerting for Edge building network devices will be temporarily unavailable.

entry.title: Enterprise Automation and Solution Delivery services maintenance for Instructor Placement Logic Fix from Jul 23, 2026 10:00 -16:00
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 23, 10:00 - 16:00 PDT

Jul 22, 14:26 PDT
Scheduled - Enterprise Automation and Solution Delivery services maintenance for Instructor Placement Logic Fix from Jul 23, 2026 10:00 -16:00

The EASD Team will be releasing software updates that may affect Scheduling services

During this maintenance window there may be a potential interruption to the apps and services for <30 min (between 14:00 to 14:30)
Release activities will be completed between from Jul 23, 2026 10:00 - 16:00
Apps/Services:

Bug fixes / Enhancement for Instructor Placement Logic Fix
Fix to have eligible instructor assigned (not skipped) and the placeholder is skipped due to not having any eligibility in WD.
Impacts:

No other impacts to end users.
Reason for maintenance:

IRP Student: Instructor Placement Logic Fix

THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 23, 07:00 - 08:00 PDT

entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 22, 21:00 PDT  -  Jul 23, 02:00 PDT

Jul 21, 13:58 PDT
Scheduled - Maintenance will be performed on the Point Grey Load Balancers on July 22, 2026, 21:00 - July 23, 2026, 02:00 PT
No service impact is expected.

entry.title: Sockeye Extended Maintenance July 21, 2026 09:00 - July 22, 2026 18:00 PT
entry.content:
Jul 22, 18:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jul 21, 09:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 7, 16:02 PDT
Scheduled - UBC ARC Sockeye will be unavailable on Tuesday, July 21 from 09:00 until Wednesday July 22 18:00 PT for scheduled maintenance.

User Impact:

1. During this time, you will be unable to log in or transfer data to/from Sockeye, OnDemand, and Chinook.

2. All jobs will be queued. The scheduler will not start any job if its requested walltime overlaps with the
maintenance window, even if resources are available. Only jobs expected to finish before downtime
begins will be scheduled, if resources allow.

3. In rare cases, running jobs may need to be resubmitted. Please checkpoint or complete your jobs before
the maintenance window to avoid lost progress, and check your job queue afterward.

entry.title: Turnitin and Gradescope Scheduled Maintenance — July 18, 2026, 8:00 a.m. – 2:00 p.m. Pacific
entry.content:
Jul 18, 14:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jul 18, 08:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 23, 14:39 PDT
Scheduled - There will be a scheduled Turnitin and Gradescope maintenance outage on Saturday, July 18, 2026, from 8:00 a.m. to 2:00 p.m. Pacific. During this period, the https://turnitin.com/ standalone Turnitin tool, the Turnitin integration on Canvas, and Gradescope may have intermittent availability.

Please email LT.Hub@ubc.ca if you have any questions or concerns.

Jul 18, 08:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jul 17, 21:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 13, 11:46 PDT
Scheduled - Please be advised that on July 17, 2026, 21:00 PT to July 18, 2026, 08:00 PT, Workday will be undergoing scheduled maintenance as part of its quarterly service update. During the scheduled maintenance period, Workday will be unavailable for use.
Learn about Workday Support at UBC and other available resources on isc.ubc.ca.

Jul 17, 19:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jul 17, 17:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 17, 16:15 PDT
Scheduled - The Cybersecurity Confidential Communications website cc.cybersecurity.ubc.ca will be undergoing scheduled maintenance on July 17, 2026, 17:00-19:00 PT. During this time, users will not be able to access this site.

entry.title: TouchNet PROD site - Scheduled Maintenance July 17, 2026 - 12:00 a.m. to July 17, 2026 - 04:00 a.m.
entry.content:
Jul 17, 04:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jul 17, 00:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 26, 15:11 PDT
Scheduled - The TouchNet PROD site will be undergoing scheduled maintenance. During the update window the TouchNet PROD site will be offline for logging in by staff as a TouchNet user and for customers making new payments. During this time when the payor clicks "pay now" TouchNet will display a screen informing the payor that the system is off line for maintenance and to try again after the system is back online.

For any questions please contact dpp.support@ubc.ca

entry.title: UBCIT eSAM Servers Maintenance July 16, 2026, 20:00-23:00 PT
entry.content:
Jul 16, 23:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jul 16, 20:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 9, 10:33 PDT
Scheduled - UBCIT will be performing maintenance on the eSAM component and vault servers on July 16, 2026, 20:00-23:00 PT. This change will affect both UBC campuses.

Users will intermittently not be able to login to any servers managed by eSAM, nor retrieve any credentials via the eSAM Web UI throughout the maintanance window.

Any connections terminated while a component is being rebooted can be reconnected to the secondary node. All connections will be terminated and users won't be able to reconnect while we patch the vault servers (which typically lasts around 30 minutes) during this window.

entry.title: Allard Law Online Application Server Maintenance - July 16, 2026 08:00 PT-17:00 PT
entry.content:
Jul 16, 17:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jul 16, 08:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 14, 14:48 PDT
Scheduled - Maintenance will be performed on the Allard Law Online Application server from July 16, 2026 08:00 PT to July 16, 2026 17:00 PT. During this period, the server will not be available.

entry.title: EASD - Planned Maintenance to upgrade Elastic Kubernetes Service (AWS EKS) from July 16, 2026 10:00 PT-16:00 PT
entry.content:
Jul 16, 16:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jul 16, 10:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 14, 14:52 PDT
Scheduled - On July 16th, 2026, DevOps will perform a planned upgrade of our Elastic Kubernetes Service (AWS EKS) cluster.

No downtime is expected.

In the unlikely event that an issue occurs during the upgrade, the downtime windows are outlined below.

Potential Downtime Windows (PT)

11:05 – 11:35
13:05 – 13:35
Modified / Impacted Infrastructure

EKS Cluster (1.32 --> 1.34)
Node Groups (1.32 --> 1.34)
EKS Add-ons
CoreDNS (v1.11.4‑eksbuild.28 → v1.13.2-eksbuild.7)
VPC CNI (v1.21.1-eksbuild.3 → v1.21.2-eksbuild.2)
kube-proxy (v1.32.11‑eksbuild.2 → v1.34.6-eksbuild.8)
Services
Rundeck
Telegraf
InfluxDB
Chronograph
Kapacitor
Alerta
BPMS redirect
Rundeck Impact
Multiple Rundeck projects and scheduled jobs may be affected during the potential downtime windows.

entry.title: UBC SharePoint Maintenance Thursday, July 16, 2026 09:00 PT to 13:00 PT
entry.content:
Jul 16, 13:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jul 16, 09:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 10, 10:06 PDT
Scheduled - On Thursday, July 16, 2026 from 09:00 PT to 13:00 PT, the UBC SharePoint Software as a Service (SaaS) service will be undergoing maintenance. During this maintenance window, SharePoint on-prem sites will be accessible as no interruptions to the service are expected.

entry.title: UBC Identity Broker Upgrade July 16, 2026 07:00 PT-09:00 PT
entry.content:
Jul 16, 09:01 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jul 16, 07:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 14, 14:45 PDT
Scheduled - The UBC Identity Broker (IDBK) will be upgraded on July 16, 2026 from 07:00-09:00PT.

Users will experience a service interruption of approximately 5 minutes starting at 07:00.

entry.title: UBC IT Network Maintenance - UBC core at the Children and Women Hospital July 14, 2026 20:00PT - July 15, 2026 00:00PT
entry.content:
Jul 15, 00:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jul 14, 20:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 30, 15:52 PDT
Scheduled - UBC IT will be performing CWH core network maintenance from July 14, 2026 20:00PT to July 15, 2026 00:00PT. UBC network services at CWH will be unavailable for the duration of this maintenance window.

entry.title: TouchNet PROD User Login Issue July 14, 2026 12:50 PT
entry.content:
Jul 14, 13:39 PDT
Resolved - The issue has been resolved.

Jul 14, 12:51 PDT
Investigating - The vendor TouchNet has advised that they are aware of an issue impacting some users and students logging in to TouchNet PROD this afternoon and is actively working to resolve. They anticipate providing another update by 2 p.m. PT, if not sooner and apologize for the inconvenience.
For any questions please contact dpp.support@ubc.ca

entry.title: Enterprise Automation & Solution Delivery service maintenance for Affiliate Student Management Tool 13 Jul 2026 10:00 - 16:00 PT
entry.content:
Jul 13, 16:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jul 13, 10:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 8, 14:36 PDT
Scheduled - The Enterprise Automation and Solution Delivery (EASD) Affiliate Student Management Tool (ASMT) will undergo maintenance from 13 Jul 2026 from 10:00 - 16:00

Apps/Services:

Bug fixes for Affiliate Student Management Tool (ASMT)
Fix a bug where a student record is stuck in Pending status in ASMT Incomplete Operations.

Fix a bug where shared ElastiCache usage in non-production environments causes performance issues due to inefficient queries and large data volume.

Impacts:

During this maintenance there may be a brief interruption (from 13 Jul 2026 from 12:00 - 12:30) to the apps and services listed above.
Impacted Services:

ubc-iec--asmt-api--1
